nasb.text: No man has authority to restrain the wind with the wind, or authority over the day of death; and there is no discharge in the time of war, and evil will not deliver those who practice it.

esv.text: No man has power to retain the spirit, or power over the day of death. There is no discharge from war, nor will wickedness deliver those who are given to it.

cnv.text: 沒有人能支配風，把它留住；沒有人能控制死期；戰爭之時，沒有人能免役；邪惡救不了行邪惡的人。

ccb.text: 无人能掌管生命，留住生命，也无人能掌管死期。无人能免于这场争战，邪恶也救不了作恶者。

csbs.text: 没有人能掌控风把风留住；也没有人能掌管死期；战争之时，无人能免；邪恶也救不了行邪恶的人。
